title: HOOK — playground arrival (Nano Banana group-shot locked, v2)
preRenderNote: Composition is anchored by the Nano Banana 3-character group still (group_ep13_clip1_hook.png) — Papa CENTER + Sara CENTER-LEFT + Eva CENTER-RIGHT. Locks the count at exactly 3 and prevents the sister-pair similar-pose dup-render bug that hit v1.
prompt: Wide cinematic kid-show family-comedy shot at @ep13-clip1-group — sunny tree-shaded green park, mulch ground, wooden tower playground softly visible BACKGROUND-RIGHT, soft warm afternoon light. The composition is anchored by the @ep13-clip1-group pre-rendered group still — exactly THREE figures locked in place: Papa CENTER, Sara CENTER-LEFT, Eva CENTER-RIGHT. Kling animates the still gently — soft smiles widening, gentle in-place sway, NO walking, NO position changes. POSITION LOCK — every character stays in their EXACT same spot from the source still throughout the entire 10s. Exactly THREE people in the entire frame. (BEAT 1 — 0-5s) All three in their locked poses, looking out at the playground with cheerful warm smiles, gentle synchronized sway. Papa (warm cheerful dad-voice from his locked spot): "Welcome to the play-PARK!" Sara (cheerful kid-voice, beaming, locked in place): "PLAYGROUND DAY!" (BEAT 2 — 5-10s) Eva softly raises one hand in cheerful celebration from her locked spot. Eva (cheerful giggle, hands then back at chest): "Slide! Swings! Tree-house!" Papa (warm chuckle, eyes crinkled, still in locked center pose): "First one to the slide!" Calm cheerful warm kid-show family ambiance throughout. STRICT ANATOMY: each character has exactly two arms and two hands at all times. Each character stays in their EXACT same physical spot from the still — no walking, no leaping, no jumping, no position changes. The mulch and playground stay plain clean — no marks, no red, no debris.
